product_overview: This patch ensures reliable connectivity between the Master backend and Agent nodes by making gRPC client selection respect each node's configured scheme (mTLS vs insecure). It updates the gRPC ClientPool and relevant API code paths so nodes registered with an insecure scheme (http) can be probed and polled without requiring a global insecure flag.
core_goals: Ensure per-node gRPC security selection so nodes registered as http can be contacted insecurely while nodes using mTLS remain secure.
Fix the UI 'Offline' status by restoring successful stats polling from Agents during routine polling and probe operations.
Make Server RPC actions (start/stop/restart/reset/command) use the same per-node security decision so control operations work consistently.
Provide clear error responses when agents are unreachable and avoid forcing global configuration changes (GRPC_INSECURE) for local testing.

features.name: Authentication
features.description: User registration, login, and profile management via Supabase JWT required for protected Master endpoints.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/auth/register with valid email/password -> Receive 201 with created User object
POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with User object and JWT token
GET /api/v1/auth/me with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with current User profile
PUT /api/v1/auth/me with Authorization: Bearer <token> and body { username } -> Receive 200 with updated user
POST /api/v1/auth/login with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 Invalid credentials

features.name: Node Management
features.description: Admin CRUD for Agent nodes, plus a probe endpoint used by the UI for initial provisioning and verification.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/nodes with Authorization: Bearer <token> and body { name, fqdn, grpc_port, memory_total, disk_total, daemon_token } -> Receive 201 with { node: Node, daemon_token: string }
POST /api/v1/nodes/probe with Authorization: Bearer <token> and body { fqdn, grpc_port, daemon_token } -> Receive 200 with { success: boolean, reachable: boolean, stats: NodeStats }
GET /api/v1/nodes with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with { nodes: Node[] }
GET /api/v1/nodes/:id with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with { node: Node }
PUT /api/v1/nodes/:id with Authorization: Bearer <token> and body { ... } -> Receive 200 with { message: string }
DELETE /api/v1/nodes/:id with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with { message: string }
GET /api/v1/nodes/:id with Authorization: Bearer <token> when node retrieval is affected by known bug -> Receive 200 with { node: null }

features.name: Node Connectivity Fix (gRPC ClientPool per-node security)
features.description: Make ClientPool.GetClient accept an explicit insecureMode flag and ensure all code paths (stats polling and Server RPCs) pass node.Scheme == "http" so insecure nodes are contacted without mTLS.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token
GET /api/v1/nodes/:id/stats with Authorization: Bearer <token> where node.scheme == "http" -> Master uses ClientPool.GetClient(nodeAddress, insecureMode=true) -> Receive 200 with { stats: NodeStats }

GET /api/v1/nodes/:id/stats with Authorization: Bearer <token> where node.scheme == "https" -> Master uses ClientPool.GetClient(nodeAddress, insecureMode=false) -> Receive 200 with { stats: NodeStats }
GET /api/v1/nodes/:id/stats with Authorization: Bearer <token> when agent is unreachable or handshake fails -> Receive 503 Agent unreachable

POST /api/v1/nodes/probe with Authorization: Bearer <token> and body { fqdn, grpc_port, daemon_token } which forces insecure probing for local testing -> Receive 200 with { reachable: true, stats: NodeStats }

features.name: Server Management (RPC actions routing through per-node gRPC selection)
features.description: Create and manage game server containers; lifecycle RPCs now use the per-node insecureMode decision so control operations work for both secure and insecure nodes.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token
POST /api/v1/servers with Authorization: Bearer <token> and body { name, node_id, memory_limit, cpu_limit, disk_limit } -> Receive 201 with { server: Server }

POST /api/v1/servers/:id/start with Authorization: Bearer <token> where server.node.scheme == "http" -> Master uses ClientPool.GetClient(nodeAddress, insecureMode=true) -> gRPC Start RPC executed -> Receive 200 with { message: string }

POST /api/v1/servers/:id/stop with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Master uses ClientPool.GetClient(nodeAddress, insecureMode=(node.scheme=="http")) -> gRPC Stop RPC executed -> Receive 200 with { message: string }

POST /api/v1/servers/:id/command with Authorization: Bearer <token> and body { command } where node is reachable -> Master uses ClientPool.GetClient(nodeAddress, insecureMode=(node.scheme=="http")) -> gRPC Command RPC executed -> Receive 200 with { message: string, output: string }
POST /api/v1/servers/:id/start with Authorization: Bearer <token> when the agent is down -> Master attempts ClientPool.GetClient(...) then fails -> Receive 503 Agent unreachable

known_limitations.issue: Node Get endpoint returns nil node instead of fetching from DB
Node Update endpoint is a stub that does nothing
gRPC client pool caches connections without TTL or health checks
known_limitations.impact: Stale connections may cause failures if agent restarts
